subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Make thine ear attentive to the Call of the One, the Single One, and thy garment's hem outstretched to receive the pearls of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اجعل اذنک مستعده لاصغاء ندآء الفرد الاحد و ذیلک مبسوطا لاخذ لئالی الحکمه
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
